# Capri DAM — Comprehensive System Architecture & Codebase Reference

> Full implementation context for LLM agents and code-generation tools.
> See `llms.txt` for a concise summary.
> Last updated: 2026-06-22

---

## 1. Project Identity

- **Product Name:** Capri DAM
- **Type:** Headless Digital Asset Management Platform
- **Rails Version:** 8.1.3
- **Ruby Version:** 4.0.3
- **Schema Version:** 2026_06_16_165408

---

## 2. Database Schema (PostgreSQL)

All tables use either `bigint` (default Rails) or `uuid` primary keys (assets, folders, collections, renditions, etc).

### assets
```
id: uuid (PK, gen_random_uuid())
title: string (NOT NULL)
uuid: string (NOT NULL, UNIQUE)
status: string (default: "draft")
folder_id: uuid (FK → folders, optional)
user_id: bigint (FK → users, NOT NULL)
active_version_id: uuid (FK → asset_versions, optional)
properties: jsonb (default: {}, NOT NULL)
deleted_at: datetime (soft delete)
created_at / updated_at: datetime
```
Indexes: `folder_id`, `user_id`, `active_version_id`, `deleted_at`, `uuid` (unique), `properties` (GIN)

### asset_versions
```
id: uuid (PK)
asset_id: uuid (FK → assets, NOT NULL)
version_number: integer (NOT NULL, default: 1)
action_type: string (default: "initial_upload")
properties: jsonb (default: {})
created_by_id: bigint (FK → users)
created_at / updated_at: datetime
```
Unique index on `(asset_id, version_number)`

### asset_embeddings
```
id: uuid (PK)
asset_id: uuid (FK → assets, UNIQUE)
embedding: vector(1536) (NOT NULL)
model_name: string (NOT NULL)
created_at / updated_at: datetime
```
HNSW index on `embedding` using `vector_cosine_ops`

### folders
```
id: uuid (PK)
uuid: uuid (NOT NULL, UNIQUE)
name: string (NOT NULL)
slug: string
path: string
parent_id: uuid (FK → folders, self-referential)
user_id: bigint (FK → users, NOT NULL)
properties: jsonb (default: {})
deleted_at: datetime
created_at / updated_at: datetime
```

### folder_policies
```
id: bigint (PK)
folder_id: uuid (FK → folders, NOT NULL)
user_group_id: bigint (FK → user_groups, NOT NULL)
read_access: boolean (default: false)
write_access: boolean (default: false)
delete_access: boolean (default: false)
manage_access: boolean (default: false)
approval_flow: boolean (default: false)
explicit_deny: boolean (default: false)
created_at / updated_at: datetime
```
Unique index on `(folder_id, user_group_id)`

### collections
```
id: bigint (PK)
uuid: uuid (UNIQUE)
slug: string (UNIQUE)
name: string
description: text
collection_type: string (NOT NULL, default: "manual")
expires_at: datetime
properties: jsonb (stores tags[], allowed_groups[], denied_groups[])
user_id: integer
deleted_at: datetime
created_at / updated_at: datetime
```

### collection_rules
```
id: bigint (PK)
collection_id: bigint (FK → collections, NOT NULL)
semantic_prompt: text (NOT NULL)
similarity_threshold: decimal(4,3) (default: 0.8)
metadata_filters: jsonb (default: {})
active: boolean (NOT NULL, default: true)
created_at / updated_at: datetime
```
GIN index on `metadata_filters`

### collection_assets (join table)
```
id: bigint (PK)
collection_id: bigint (FK → collections)
asset_id: uuid (FK → assets)
collection_rule_id: bigint (FK → collection_rules, nullable — null = manually added)
pinned: boolean (NOT NULL, default: false)
position: integer (default: 0)
user_id: integer
created_at / updated_at: datetime
```
Unique index on `(collection_id, asset_id)`

### users
```
id: bigint (PK)
email: string (NOT NULL, UNIQUE)
name: string (NOT NULL)
first_name: string
last_name: string
username: string (UNIQUE)
department: string
role: string (default: "viewer")  -- values: viewer, editor, admin
admin: boolean (NOT NULL, default: false)
active: boolean (default: true)
avatar_url: string
provider: string  -- OmniAuth provider name
uid: string       -- OmniAuth UID
force_password_change: boolean (default: false)
encrypted_password: string
reset_password_token: string
remember_created_at: datetime
preferences: jsonb (default: {})
created_at / updated_at: datetime
```

### user_groups
```
id: bigint (PK)
name: string (NOT NULL, UNIQUE)
description: string
created_at / updated_at: datetime
```

### user_group_memberships
```
id: bigint (PK)
user_id: bigint (FK → users)
user_group_id: bigint (FK → user_groups)
created_at / updated_at: datetime
```
Unique index on `(user_id, user_group_id)`

### user_group_closures (closure table, no PK)
```
ancestor_id: bigint (NOT NULL)
descendant_id: bigint (NOT NULL)
distance: integer (NOT NULL)
```
Unique index on `(ancestor_id, descendant_id)`

### workflows
```
id: bigint (PK)
name: string
description: text
trigger_type: string  -- e.g., "on_upload"
status: integer  -- enum: inactive(0), active(1), draft(2)
folder_scope: string (default: "all")  -- "all" | "specific"
target_folder_ids: string[] (default: [])
exclude_folder_ids: string[] (default: [])
graph_data: jsonb (default: {})
metadata: jsonb
fallback_assignee_id: string
fallback_assignee_type: string
created_by_id: integer
updated_by_id: integer
created_at / updated_at: datetime
```

### workflow_steps
```
id: bigint (PK)
workflow_id: bigint (FK → workflows)
title: string
description: text
step_type: string
logic: string
position: integer
deadline_days: integer
assignee_id: integer
assignee_type: string
configuration: jsonb
updated_by_id: integer
created_at / updated_at: datetime
```

### workflow_instances
```
id: bigint (PK)
workflow_id: bigint (FK → workflows)
asset_id: uuid (FK → assets)
status: string
current_step_id: integer
blueprint_snapshot: jsonb (default: {})  -- snapshot of steps at time of trigger
audit_log: jsonb
started_at: datetime
completed_at: datetime
last_action_by_id: integer
created_at / updated_at: datetime
```

### workflow_tasks
```
id: bigint (PK)
workflow_instance_id: bigint (FK → workflow_instances)
workflow_step_id: bigint (FK → workflow_steps)
user_id: bigint (FK → users)
status: string (NOT NULL, default: "pending")  -- "pending" | "approved" | "rejected"
comment: text
completed_at: datetime
created_at / updated_at: datetime
```

### ingestion_batches
```
id: uuid (PK)
name: string (NOT NULL)
source_type: string (NOT NULL)
status: integer (NOT NULL, default: 0)
total_count: integer (default: 0)
processed_count: integer (default: 0)
user_id: integer
created_at / updated_at: datetime
```

### ingestion_items
```
id: uuid (PK)
ingestion_batch_id: uuid (FK → ingestion_batches)
original_filename: string (NOT NULL)
file_hash: string
file_size: bigint
status: integer (default: 0)
legacy_metadata: jsonb (default: {})
clean_properties: jsonb (default: {})
error_log: text
created_at / updated_at: datetime
```

### renditions
```
id: uuid (PK)
asset_id: uuid (FK → assets)
storage_backend_id: uuid (FK → storage_backends)
kind: string (NOT NULL)  -- e.g., "thumbnail", "web", "print"
storage_key: string (NOT NULL)
content_type: string
width: integer
height: integer
file_size: bigint
metadata: jsonb (default: {})
created_at / updated_at: datetime
```

### storage_backends
```
id: uuid (PK)
name: string (NOT NULL)
provider_type: string (NOT NULL)  -- "local" | "aws_s3" | etc.
configuration: jsonb (NOT NULL, default: {})
active: boolean (default: true)
created_at / updated_at: datetime
```

### email_templates
```
id: bigint (PK)
name: string (NOT NULL)
event_trigger: string (NOT NULL, UNIQUE)  -- e.g., "user_created", "workflow_approved"
subject: string (NOT NULL)
html_body: text   -- Liquid template
text_body: text   -- Liquid template
active: boolean (NOT NULL, default: true)
created_at / updated_at: datetime
```

### email_deliveries
```
id: bigint (PK)
email_template_id: bigint (FK → email_templates)
recipient_email: string (NOT NULL)
payload: jsonb (NOT NULL, default: {})  -- Liquid context variables
status: string (NOT NULL, default: "pending")  -- "pending" | "sent" | "failed"
retry_count: integer (NOT NULL, default: 0)
error_log: text
created_at / updated_at: datetime
```

### audit_logs
```
id: bigint (PK)
user_id: bigint (FK → users)
action: string
auditable_type: string
auditable_id: integer
changes_data: jsonb
ip_address: string
user_agent: string
created_at / updated_at: datetime
```

### system_configurations
```
id: bigint (PK)
key: string (NOT NULL, UNIQUE)
value: text (NOT NULL)
data_type: string (NOT NULL, default: "string")
description: string
fallback_value: text
expires_at: datetime
updated_by_id: integer
created_at / updated_at: datetime
```

### system_connectors
```
id: bigint (PK)
name: string
provider_type: string
endpoint: string
auth_token: string
status: string
concurrency_limit: integer
rps_limit: integer
last_sync: datetime
assets_imported: integer
tdm_sanitation: boolean
webhook_secret: string
created_at / updated_at: datetime
```

### ai_configurations
```
id: bigint (PK)
active_provider: string
generation_model: string
embedding_model: string
system_prompt: text
monthly_budget_usd: decimal
current_spend_usd: decimal
fallback_to_local: boolean
created_at / updated_at: datetime
```

### notifications / in_app_notifications
```
notifications: user_id, title, message, action_url, read_at
in_app_notifications: user_id, actor_id, notifiable_type, notifiable_id, action_type, message, read_at
```

### daily_metrics
```
metric_date: date (NOT NULL)
metric_name: string (NOT NULL)
metric_value: integer (default: 0)
metadata: jsonb (default: {})
```
Unique index on `(metric_date, metric_name)`

---

## 3. Model Implementations

### Asset (app/models/asset.rb)
```ruby
class Asset < ApplicationRecord
  belongs_to :user
  belongs_to :folder, optional: true
  has_many :asset_versions, dependent: :destroy
  belongs_to :active_version, class_name: 'AssetVersion', optional: true
  has_many :workflow_instances, dependent: :destroy
  has_one_attached :file
  has_one :asset_embedding, dependent: :destroy
  has_many :collection_assets, dependent: :destroy
  has_many :collections, through: :collection_assets

  after_commit :broadcast_for_embedding, on: [:create, :update]

  validates :title, presence: true

  enum :status, {
    draft: 0, pending: 1, processing: 2, ready: 3,
    in_review: 4, approved: 5, rejected: 6, failed: 7
  }, default: :draft

  scope :nearest_to_vector, ->(vector) {
    joins(:asset_embedding)
      .merge(AssetEmbedding.nearest_neighbors(:embedding, vector, distance: "cosine"))
      .select("assets.*")
  }

  include SoftDeletable

  def next_version_number
    (asset_versions.maximum(:version_number) || 0) + 1
  end

  private

  def broadcast_for_embedding
    return if properties.blank?
    redis = Redis.new(url: ENV.fetch("REDIS_URL", "redis://localhost:6379/0"))
    redis.publish('ai_gateway_events', { event: 'asset.needs_embedding', asset_uuid: self.id }.to_json)
  end

  def set_property_defaults
    self.properties ||= { description: "", usage_terms: "Internal Use Only", alt_text: "", tags: [] }
  end
end
```

### User (app/models/user.rb)
```ruby
class User < ApplicationRecord
  include Auditable
  devise :database_authenticatable, :registerable, :recoverable, :rememberable,
         :validatable, :omniauthable, omniauth_providers: %i[keycloak_openid]

  has_many :folders, :assets, :user_group_memberships, :notifications, dependent: :destroy
  has_many :user_groups, through: :user_group_memberships

  def permissions_for(folder)
    return { read: true, write: true, delete: true, manage: true, approve: true } if admin?
    policies = FolderPolicy.where(folder_id: folder.id, user_group_id: effective_group_ids)
    return { read: false, write: false, delete: false, manage: false, approve: false } if policies.any?(&:explicit_deny)
    {
      read:    policies.any?(&:read_access),
      write:   policies.any?(&:write_access),
      delete:  policies.any?(&:delete_access),
      manage:  policies.any?(&:manage_access),
      approve: policies.any?(&:approval_flow)
    }
  end

  def effective_group_ids
    direct_ids = user_groups.select(:id)
    UserGroupClosure.where(descendant_id: direct_ids).select(:ancestor_id)
  end

  def active_for_authentication?
    super && active?
  end
end
```

### Collection (app/models/collection.rb)
```ruby
class Collection < ApplicationRecord
  store_accessor :properties, :tags, :allowed_groups, :denied_groups
  belongs_to :user
  has_many :collection_assets, dependent: :destroy
  has_one :collection_rule, dependent: :destroy
  has_many :assets, through: :collection_assets

  validates :collection_type, inclusion: { in: %w[manual smart] }
  scope :active, -> { where(deleted_at: nil).where('expires_at IS NULL OR expires_at > ?', Time.current) }

  def accessible_by?(user)
    return true if user.admin? || user.id == self.user_id
    user_group_names = user.user_groups.pluck(:name)
    return false if denied_groups.present? && (denied_groups & user_group_names).any?
    return (allowed_groups & user_group_names).any? if allowed_groups.present? && allowed_groups.any?
    true
  end

  def compliance_violations
    # Detects: (1) Internal assets in external-facing collections
    # (2) Asset license expiry before collection TTL
    violations = []
    is_externally_accessible = Array(allowed_groups).empty? || Array(allowed_groups).include?("External Agencies")
    assets.find_each do |asset|
      props = asset.properties || {}
      if is_externally_accessible && props['usage_terms'] == 'Internal Use Only'
        violations << { asset_id: asset.id, reason: "Internal Use Only in external workspace" }
      end
      if props['license_expires_at'].present? && self.expires_at.present?
        violations << { asset_id: asset.id, reason: "License expires before campaign TTL" } if Time.zone.parse(props['license_expires_at']) < self.expires_at
      end
    end
    violations
  end
end
```

### SoftDeletable concern (app/models/concerns/soft_deletable.rb)
```ruby
module SoftDeletable
  extend ActiveSupport::Concern
  included do
    scope :active, -> { where(deleted_at: nil) }
    scope :trashed, -> { where.not(deleted_at: nil) }
  end
  def soft_delete = update(deleted_at: Time.current)
  def restore = update(deleted_at: nil)
  def trashed? = deleted_at.present?
end
```

---

## 4. Key Services

### WorkflowEvaluatorService (app/services/workflow_evaluator_service.rb)
Called after an asset is processed (`on_upload`). Checks all active workflows against the asset's folder.
```ruby
WorkflowEvaluatorService.call(asset, trigger_event: 'on_upload')
```
Logic:
- `folder_scope: 'specific'` → asset.folder_id must be in `workflow.target_folder_ids`
- `folder_scope: 'all'` → asset.folder_id must NOT be in `workflow.exclude_folder_ids`
- If match → `WorkflowInitiatorWorker.perform_async(asset.id, workflow.id)`

### EmailOrchestrator (app/services/email_orchestrator.rb)
```ruby
EmailOrchestrator.trigger('user_created', 'user@example.com', { 'user' => { 'first_name' => 'Jane' } })
```
1. Finds active `EmailTemplate` by `event_trigger`
2. Creates `EmailDelivery` record (status: pending)
3. Enqueues `EmailDispatcherWorker`
4. Worker renders Liquid template with payload and sends email

### StorageManager (app/services/storage_manager.rb)
```ruby
backend = StorageBackend.find_by(active: true)
storage = StorageManager.adapter_for(backend)
storage.store(file_io, "path/to/file.jpg")
storage.delete("path/to/file.jpg")
```
Adapters: `StorageAdapters::LocalStorageAdapter` (dev), S3 adapter (TODO)

---

## 5. Background Workers

### AssetProcessorWorker (queue: `ingest`, retry: 3)
Called with `(version_id, staging_path)` after file upload.
1. Opens staging file, extracts universal metadata (size, SHA256 checksum, MIME type via Marcel)
2. For images: MiniMagick extracts width/height/aspect_ratio/colorspace/EXIF/color_palette; RTesseract performs OCR
3. For PDFs: sets `document_type: 'PDF'`
4. Stores physical file to `StorageBackend` at path `"<asset_uuid>/v<N>_<hex>.<ext>"`
5. Merges all extracted metadata into `AssetVersion.properties`
6. Sets `Asset.status = 'ready'`
7. Enqueues `AssetWorkflowTriggerWorker`

### SmartCollectionRouterWorker (queue: `smartai`, retry: 3)
Called with `(asset_id)` after `AssetEmbedding` is created/updated.
1. Loads asset's `vector_embedding`
2. Iterates all active `CollectionRule` records
3. Skips expired collections (TTL check)
4. Checks `metadata_filters` hard guardrails against `asset.properties`
5. Computes cosine similarity via `VectorCalculator.cosine_similarity`
6. If `similarity >= rule.similarity_threshold` → `CollectionAsset.find_or_create_by!` with `collection_rule` reference

### Asset Upload Pipeline (full sequence)
```
POST /api/v1/assets
  → Asset.create! (status: pending)
  → AssetVersion.create! (version_number: 1, action_type: initial_upload)
  → File copied to tmp/uploads/ (staging)
  → Asset.update!(active_version_id: version.id)
  → AssetProcessorWorker.perform_async(version.id, staging_path)
  → (worker) extracts metadata, stores file in StorageBackend
  → (worker) Asset.update!(status: ready)
  → (worker) AssetWorkflowTriggerWorker.perform_async(asset.id, 'on_upload')
  → (worker) WorkflowEvaluatorService evaluates Workflow matches
  → (worker) WorkflowInitiatorWorker creates WorkflowInstance + WorkflowTasks
  → Asset.after_commit → broadcasts to Redis 'ai_gateway_events'
  → Python AI Gateway generates 1536-dim embedding
  → PATCH /api/v1/assets/:id/embedding → AssetEmbedding.upsert
  → AssetEmbedding.after_commit → SmartCollectionRouterWorker.perform_async
```

---

## 6. Image Editor Pipeline (POST /api/v1/assets/:id/process_image)

Three save modes:
- **`new`** (Fork/Clone): Creates a brand new `Asset` + copies current version number. Original untouched.
- **`overwrite`** (Destructive): Bakes into existing version row. Triggers CDN invalidation.
- **`version`** (Branch): Creates new `AssetVersion` with bumped `version_number`. If `target_folder_id` differs, creates a new `Asset` in that folder.

MiniMagick operations available:
- `geometry.flip_horizontal` → `.flop`
- `geometry.rotate` → `.rotate(degrees)`
- `adjustments.brightness` / `adjustments.contrast` → `.brightness_contrast`
- `adjustments.saturation` → `.modulate`
- `custom_cli` → raw ImageMagick flags injected (e.g., `-monochrome -charcoal 2`)

Post-bake workers dispatched:
1. `AssetProcessorWorker` — re-processes the baked file
2. `CdnInvalidationWorker` — purges CDN
3. `EdgeMetadataSyncWorker` — syncs metadata to edge

---

## 7. Authentication & Authorization

### Hybrid Auth (`authenticate_hybrid!`)
```ruby
def authenticate_hybrid!
  return if user_signed_in?          # Devise session (browser)
  doorkeeper_authorize!              # OAuth2 Bearer token (API clients)
end
```

### RBAC Resolution (User#permissions_for)
```ruby
user.permissions_for(folder)
# => { read: true, write: true, delete: false, manage: false, approve: false }
```
Logic:
1. Admin? → full permissions
2. Fetch FolderPolicies for `(folder_id, user.effective_group_ids)`
3. Any policy has `explicit_deny: true`? → all false (short-circuit)
4. OR-aggregate each permission boolean across all policies

### ABAC on Collections (Collection#accessible_by?)
1. Admin or owner? → true
2. `denied_groups` ∩ user_groups → false (explicit deny)
3. `allowed_groups` present + `allowed_groups` ∩ user_groups → true/false
4. No whitelist → true (public)

### SSO (OmniAuth Keycloak)
- Callback: `User.from_omniauth(auth)` → `find_or_create_by(provider:, uid:)`
- Auto-generates username as `<email_prefix>_sso`

---

## 8. GraphQL API

Schema: `HeadlessDamSchema` at `app/graphql/headless_dam_schema.rb`

### Queries
```graphql
query {
  assetDetail(uuid: "abc-123") {
    id uuid title properties createdAt
  }
  searchAssets(query: "beach", mode: "images", metadataFilters: { region: "EMEA" }) {
    nodes { id uuid title properties createdAt }
  }
  collections {
    id name slug collectionType expiresAt assetsCount
  }
  collection(slug: "summer-2026") {
    id name collectionRule { semanticPrompt similarityThreshold }
  }
}
```

### Types
- `AssetType`: id, uuid, title, properties (JsonType), createdAt
- `CollectionType`: standard collection fields + collection_rule
- `JsonType`: arbitrary JSONB pass-through scalar

### Authorization
`AssetType.authorized?` requires `context[:current_user]` to be present.

---

## 9. React Frontend Components

### Mount Pattern
Components are registered in `app/javascript/components/Registry.jsx` and mounted via `data-view` attributes.

### Key Components
| Component | Route | Purpose |
|-----------|-------|---------|
| `DashboardManager` | `/dashboard` | Overview stats and recent activity |
| `FoldersManager` | `/folders` | Folder tree sidebar + asset browser |
| `AssetExplorer` | (embedded in FoldersManager) | Grid/list view of assets in a folder |
| `AssetViewer` | (modal/drawer) | Full asset detail with tabs |
| `AssetVersionsTab` | (tab in AssetViewer) | Version history timeline |
| `AssetAuditTab` | (tab in AssetViewer) | Audit trail diff viewer |
| `AssetTagsEditor` | (tab in AssetViewer) | JSONB metadata editor |
| `AssetStatisticsTab` | (tab in AssetViewer) | Storage/usage stats |
| `ImageEditorDialog` | (modal) | Canvas editor → POST process_image |
| `UploadWorkspace` | (drawer) | Drag-and-drop uploader with hash dedup |
| `DuplicateResolverDialog` | (modal) | Resolves duplicate hash conflicts |
| `PinToCollectionDialog` | (modal) | Adds asset to a collection |
| `ExplorerTopBar` | (toolbar) | Search, filter, view toggle |
| `AssetFilterBar` | (sidebar) | Dynamic JSONB facet filters |
| `BinManager` | `/bin` | Trashed assets/folders with restore/purge |
| `CollectionsManager` | `/collections` | Collection board |
| `SearchManager` | `/search` | Global search with facets |
| `WorkflowContainer` | `/workflows` | Workflow designer (graph editor) |
| `WorkflowDashboard` | `/workflows/dashboard` | Pending tasks per user |
| `UsersManager` | (admin) | User CRUD + activate/deactivate |
| `UserGroupsManager` | (admin) | Group hierarchy + folder policy management |
| `ReportsManager` | (admin) | Report builder + export |
| `EmailEngineManager` | (admin) | Email template CRUD with Liquid preview |
| `SystemStatus` | (admin) | Health checks, SMTP config |
| `Settings` | `/settings` | Storage backend + CDN configuration |

---

## 10. REST API Reference

### Authentication
All `/api/v1/` endpoints use `authenticate_hybrid!`:
- Browser: Devise session cookie
- API clients: `Authorization: Bearer <doorkeeper_token>`

### Assets
```
POST   /api/v1/assets                          # Upload (multipart/form-data: file, title, folder_id)
GET    /api/v1/assets/:id                      # Show
PATCH  /api/v1/assets/:id                      # Update metadata
DELETE /api/v1/assets/:id                      # Soft delete → bin
POST   /api/v1/assets/:id/restore              # Restore from bin
DELETE /api/v1/assets/:id/permanent            # Permanent delete
GET    /api/v1/assets/:id/versions             # Version history
GET    /api/v1/assets/:id/audit_trail          # Audit trail
POST   /api/v1/assets/:id/versions/:vid/restore # Restore to version
POST   /api/v1/assets/:id/process_image        # Bake image edits
GET    /api/v1/assets/:id/watermarked          # Download watermarked copy
GET    /api/v1/assets/:id/workflow_history     # Active workflow tasks
PATCH  /api/v1/assets/:id/embedding            # Upsert pgvector embedding
GET    /api/v1/bin                             # Trashed assets + folders
POST   /api/v1/assets/check_hashes            # { hashes: ["sha256..."] } → duplicates map
GET    /api/v1/assets/local/:uuid              # Serve local file (dev only)
```

### Folders
```
GET    /api/v1/folders           # List (with RBAC filtering)
GET    /api/v1/folders/:id       # Show with breadcrumbs + policies
POST   /api/v1/folders           # Create
POST   /api/v1/folders/:id/restore
DELETE /api/v1/folders/:id/permanent
```

### Collections
```
GET    /api/v1/collections                          # List active
POST   /api/v1/collections                          # Create
GET    /api/v1/collections/:slug                    # Show (with compliance violations)
PATCH  /api/v1/collections/:slug                    # Update
DELETE /api/v1/collections/:slug                    # Soft delete
DELETE /api/v1/collections/bulk_delete             # { ids: [...] }
PATCH  /api/v1/collections/bulk_update             # { ids: [...], collection: {...} }
POST   /api/v1/collections/simulate_rule           # { semantic_prompt:, similarity_threshold: }
POST   /api/v1/collections/:slug/rule              # Configure smart rule
GET    /api/v1/collections/:slug/cluster_map       # 2D UMAP data
POST   /api/v1/collections/:slug/assets            # Add asset
DELETE /api/v1/collections/:slug/assets/:asset_id  # Remove asset
PATCH  /api/v1/collections/:slug/assets/:asset_id/pin # Toggle pin
POST   /api/v1/collections/:slug/purge_cdn         # Trigger CDN purge
```

### Search
```
GET /api/v1/search?q=beach&mode=images&region=EMEA
# Returns: { meta: { query, mode, total_found, facets }, results: [...] }
```

### Semantic Search (Copilot)
```
POST /api/v1/copilot/search
Body: { query: "warm summer beach photography" }
# Calls Python AI Gateway → pgvector HNSW → top 20 assets
```

### Workflows
```
GET  /api/v1/workflows/dashboard     # Pending tasks for current user
POST /api/v1/workflow_tasks/:id/submit  # { status: "approved"|"rejected", comment: "..." }
```

### Notifications
```
GET   /api/v1/notifications
PATCH /api/v1/notifications/mark_all_read
PATCH /api/v1/notifications/:id/mark_read
```

### Ingestion
```
POST /api/v1/ingestion_batches         # Start bulk import batch
GET  /api/v1/ingestion_batches         # List batches
GET  /api/v1/ingestion_items/:id       # Item status
PATCH /api/v1/ingestion_items/:id      # Update item
POST /api/v1/webhooks/connectors/:connector_id/receive  # Webhook receiver
```

---

## 11. Admin API Reference

Namespace: `/admin/` — restricted to `admin?` users.

```
GET  /admin/system_status
POST /admin/system_status/update_smtp
POST /admin/system_status/test_email
POST /admin/system_status/restart_server

GET  /admin/users
POST /admin/users
PATCH /admin/users/:id
POST /admin/users/:id/toggle_status

GET    /admin/user_groups
POST   /admin/user_groups
PATCH  /admin/user_groups/:id
DELETE /admin/user_groups/:id
POST   /admin/user_groups/:id/add_user     # { user_id: }
DELETE /admin/user_groups/:id/remove_user  # { user_id: }

GET    /admin/folders/:id/folder_policies           # RBAC policies for folder
POST   /admin/folders/:id/folder_policies           # Create policy
DELETE /admin/folders/:id/folder_policies/:group_id # Remove policy

GET    /admin/email_templates
POST   /admin/email_templates
PATCH  /admin/email_templates/:id
DELETE /admin/email_templates/:id

GET  /admin/email_deliveries
POST /admin/email_deliveries/:id/retry

GET  /admin/reports
GET  /admin/reports/:id
POST /admin/reports/:id/generate

GET /admin/report_snapshots
GET /admin/report_snapshots/:id/download

GET /admin/migrations/ingestion
GET /admin/migrations/connectors
GET /admin/migrations/health

GET /admin/system_configurations/logging
POST /admin/system_configurations/logging
```

---

## 12. Asset Properties JSONB Schema

The `properties` JSONB column on both `Asset` and `AssetVersion` is the central metadata store. Common keys:

```json
{
  "original_filename": "hero-banner.jpg",
  "content_type": "image/jpeg",
  "size": 2048576,
  "size_human": "1.95 MB",
  "checksum_sha256": "abc123...",
  "storage_path": "uuid/v1_ab12.jpg",
  "width": 3840,
  "height": 2160,
  "aspect_ratio": 1.78,
  "resolution": "3840 x 2160",
  "color_space": "sRGB",
  "color_palette": ["#FF5733", "#C70039", "#900C3F"],
  "camera_make": "Canon",
  "camera_model": "EOS R5",
  "extracted_text": "SALE 50% OFF",
  "alt_text": "Hero banner for summer campaign",
  "description": "Product launch visual",
  "usage_terms": "Internal Use Only",
  "license_expires_at": "2026-12-31T00:00:00Z",
  "tags": ["summer", "campaign", "hero"],
  "region": "EMEA",
  "brand": "CapriMark",
  "processed_at": "2026-06-22T10:30:00Z",
  "editor_state": {
    "adjustments": { "brightness": 10, "contrast": 5, "saturation": -10 },
    "crop_aspect": "16:9",
    "filter": "Warm",
    "geometry": { "rotate": 0, "flip_horizontal": false, "focal_point": { "x": 50, "y": 30 } }
  }
}
```

---

## 13. Environment & Configuration

### Environment Variables
```
DATABASE_URL              PostgreSQL connection string
REDIS_URL                 Redis connection (default: redis://localhost:6379/0)
AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID         S3 credentials
AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY
AWS_REGION
S3_BUCKET_NAME
SMTP_HOST / SMTP_PORT / SMTP_USERNAME / SMTP_PASSWORD
AI_GATEWAY_URL            Python FastAPI base URL (default: http://localhost:8000)
CDN_BASE_URL              Public CDN hostname
KEYCLOAK_SITE             Keycloak server URL for SSO
KEYCLOAK_REALM
KEYCLOAK_CLIENT_ID
KEYCLOAK_CLIENT_SECRET
```

### Sidekiq Queue Config (config/sidekiq.yml)
Priority order (highest → lowest):
1. `mailers`
2. `notifications`
3. `default`
4. `workflow`
5. `metadata`
6. `reports`
7. `ingest`
8. `smartai`

### Storage Backends (StorageBackend model)
Active backend selected by `StorageBackend.find_by(active: true)`.
`provider_type`:
- `"local"` → files stored at `Rails.root/storage/dam/<path>`
- `"aws_s3"` → S3 adapter (configuration: `{ bucket:, region:, ... }`)

---

## 14. Key File Paths

```
app/models/asset.rb                    # Core asset model
app/models/collection.rb               # Collection + ABAC logic
app/models/user.rb                     # RBAC + SSO
app/models/concerns/soft_deletable.rb  # Soft delete pattern
app/models/concerns/auditable.rb       # Audit tracking
app/controllers/api/v1/assets_controller.rb     # Full asset CRUD + image editor
app/controllers/api/v1/collections_controller.rb # Collections + smart routing
app/controllers/api/v1/search_controller.rb     # Lexical + faceted search
app/controllers/api/v1/copilots_controller.rb   # Semantic (vector) search
app/workers/asset_processor_worker.rb           # Core ingestion pipeline
app/workers/smart_collection_router_worker.rb   # AI routing engine
app/services/workflow_evaluator_service.rb      # Workflow trigger logic
app/services/email_orchestrator.rb              # Email dispatch
app/services/storage_manager.rb                 # Storage adapter factory
app/graphql/headless_dam_schema.rb              # GraphQL schema root
app/graphql/types/query_type.rb                 # GraphQL queries
app/javascript/components/Registry.jsx          # React component registry
app/javascript/application.js                   # React mount logic
config/routes.rb                                # All routes
config/sidekiq.yml                              # Queue config
db/schema.rb                                    # Full database schema
```

---

## 15. Testing

Framework: RSpec (`spec/`) with FactoryBot and Faker.
Swagger specs: `spec/requests/` with rswag.
Legacy Minitest tests in `test/` directory (controllers, models, integration, mailers).

---

## 16. Deployment

- **Containerization:** Docker (`Dockerfile` + `docker-entrypoint`)
- **Orchestration:** Kamal (`bin/kamal`)
- **Dev Procfile:** `Procfile.dev` — starts Rails + JS watcher simultaneously
- **Asset Pipeline:** Propshaft (not Sprockets) + jsbundling-rails (esbuild)
- **Scheduled Jobs:** `config/schedule.rb` (whenever gem)
- **Health Check:** `GET /up` → `rails/health#show`
- **Admin Queues:** `GET /admin/queues` → Sidekiq Web UI (admin-only)
- **GraphQL Explorer:** `GET /graphiql` (development only)
- **API Docs (REST):** `GET /api-docs` → Swagger UI
- **API Docs (GraphQL):** `GET /docs/graphql` → redirects to `/graphql-docs/index.html`
